originalTitle: FINAL FANTASY VII REVELATION - Reveal Trailer
content: As the world teeters on the brink of annihilation, the final battle against Sephiroth begins. A meteor mars the sky, monstrous planetary guardians wreak havoc across the globe, and the fires of war rage. Now, Cloud and his companions must stand against this chaos to not only decide the planet's fate, but bring a legendary conflict to its conclusion. In the final chapter of the FINAL FANTASY VII remake project, the scale has never been larger and the stakes have never been higher. Take to the skies and explore a boundless world, fight alongside a fully assembled party, master strategic and dynamic combat, and prepare yourself for the climactic finale. A vast planet awaits. Everything leads here. Release Date : Spring 2027 Platforms: PlayStation®5 / Nintendo Switch™ 2 / Xbox Series X|S / Windows / Steam / Epic Games Store X: https://x.com/FinalFantasyVII Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/FinalFantasyVII TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@FinalFantasyVII Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/FinalFantasyVII Threads: https://www.threads.net/@FinalFantasyVII YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/FinalFantasy © SQUARE ENIX CHARACTER DESIGN: TETSUYA NOMURA / ROBERTO FERRARI LOGO ILLUSTRATION:© YOSHITAKA AMANO #FinalFantasy #FF7R
chineseContent: 当世界濒临毁灭时，与萨菲罗斯的最终战斗开始了。一颗流星毁坏了天空，可怕的行星守护者在全球范围内造成了严重破坏，战火肆虐。现在，克劳德和他的同伴必须奋起反抗这场混乱，不仅决定地球的命运，还要结束一场传奇的冲突。 《最终幻想 VII》重制版项目的最后一章，规模之大、风险之高也前所未有。飞上天空，探索广阔的世界，与全员集结的队伍并肩作战，掌握策略性和动态的战斗，为高潮的结局做好准备。一个广阔的星球正在等待着您。一切都通向这里。发布日期：2027 年春季平台：PlayStation®5 / Nintendo Switch™ 2 / Xbox Series X|S / Windows / Steam / Epic Games Store X：https://x.com/FinalFantasyVII Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/FinalFantasyVII TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@FinalFantasyVII Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/FinalFantasyVII 主题： https://www.threads.net/@FinalFantasyVII YouTube：https://www.youtube.com/FinalFantasy © SQUARE ENIX 角色设计：TETSUYA NOMURA / ROBERTO FERRARI 徽标插图：© YOSHITAKA AMANO #FinalFantasy #FF7R
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
